mechanism: The basis trade ($800B-$1T+ at 50-100x leverage) can transform gradual stress (stages 1-2) into acute crisis (stages 4-5+) via forced selling cascades, repo spikes, and cross-asset collateral haircuts.
regime_dependence: Requires a trigger event (term premium shock, regulatory change like SEC clearing mandate). Has never been triggered by fiscal causes — all prior unwinds were exogenously triggered.
